name: Crock Pot Red Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 ham bone OR bone-in ham hock
3 tablespoons garnish (chopped fresh parsley & green onions)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the garnish in the crockpot on low heat.
2. Cook covered for 6-10 hours, checking the liquid level and adding water if needed to cover the beans.
3. If there is too much liquid, turn the heat to high and leave the pot uncovered for a few minutes.
4. Reduce heat for several hours or until ready to serve. The beans should be very tender.
5. Remove bones and bay leaves before garnishing with fresh parsley and green onions.
6. Serve over rice with grilled or smoked sausage. This dish can also be frozen.
